case_title: DAVID LEE VS. YUI TING YUEN et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF RELATED PROCEEDING;REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE;REQUEST TO DISMISS OR STAY (HEARING:JUNE16,2014 AT 5:30PM) FILED BY DEFENDANT YUEN, BRENDA

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 - SERVED JUN-02-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YUEN, YUI TING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-28-2014 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE ORIGINAL CLAIM IS MISSING FROM THE FILE; CLAIM WAS FILED BUT NOT SCANNED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT HAVE BEEN ASKED TO BRING A COPY OF THE CLAIM AT THE NEXT HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT BRENDA YUEN. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO DISMISS THIS DEFENDANT AT THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---FRANCIS HA. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---SANLEY YUEN.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
